text: I don't play against other players. I play against the idea of losing.
author: Kobe Bryant

text: I've missed more than 9000 shots in my career. I've lost almost 300 games. And that is why I succeed.
author: Michael Jordan

text: The strength of the team is each individual member. The strength of each member is the team.
author: Phil Jackson

text: Empty your mind, be formless. Shapeless, like water.
author: Bruce Lee

text: Good, better, best. Never let it rest. Until your good is better and your better is best.
author: Tim Duncan

text: Pressure is a privilege.
author: Billie Jean King

text: You can't get much done in life if you only work on the days when you feel good.
author: Jerry West

text: Everything negative - pressure, challenges - is all an opportunity for me to rise.
author: Kobe Bryant

text: Do not pray for an easy life, pray for the strength to endure a difficult one.
author: Bruce Lee

text: Hard work beats talent when talent doesn't work hard.
author: Tim Notke

text: The game has its ups and downs, but you can never lose focus.
author: Michael Jordan

text: I've always believed that if you put in the work, the results will come.
author: Michael Jordan

text: Excellence is not a singular act, but a habit.
author: Shaquille O'Neal

text: The only way to get better is to push yourself further than you think you can go.
author: Magic Johnson

text: Winning is not everything, but wanting to win is.
author: Vince Lombardi

text: The mind is everything. What you think, you become.
author: Buddha

text: You have power over your mind - not outside events. Realize this, and you will find strength.
author: Marcus Aurelius

text: We suffer more often in imagination than in reality.
author: Seneca

text: Respond from the center of the hurricane, rather than reacting to the chaos of the storm.
author: George Mumford

text: The obstacle is the way.
author: Marcus Aurelius

text: Be where your feet are.
author: Scott O'Neil

text: The present moment is filled with joy and happiness. If you are attentive, you will see it.
author: Thich Nhat Hanh

text: Nature does not hurry, yet everything is accomplished.
author: Lao Tzu

text: Anything is possible!
author: Kevin Garnett

text: I like criticism. It makes you strong.
author: LeBron James

text: If you don't believe in yourself, no one is going to believe in you.
author: Dwyane Wade

text: I never looked at the consequences of missing a big shot.
author: Michael Jordan

text: I'm not out there sweating for three hours every day just to find out what it feels like to sweat.
author: Michael Jordan

text: The only thing I'm afraid of is bees.
author: Kobe Bryant

text: I create my own path. It was straight and narrow. I looked at it this way - you were either in my way or out of it.
author: Kobe Bryant

text: Once you give them the power to tell you you're great, you've also given them the power to tell you you're unworthy.
author: Kobe Bryant

text: Pain doesn't tell you when you ought to stop. Pain is the little voice in your head that tries to hold you back.
author: Kobe Bryant

text: The moment you give up is the moment you let someone else win.
author: Kobe Bryant

text: I have self-doubt. I have insecurity. I have fear of failure. But I also have the ability to act in spite of all that.
author: Kobe Bryant

text: Use your success, wealth, and influence to put them in the best position to realize their own dreams.
author: Kobe Bryant

text: I'll do whatever it takes to win games, whether it's sitting on a bench waving a towel or hitting the game-winning shot.
author: Kobe Bryant

text: The most important thing is to try and inspire people so that they can be great in whatever they want to do.
author: Kobe Bryant

text: Sports are such a great teacher. I think of everything they've taught me: camaraderie, humility, how to resolve differences.
author: Kobe Bryant

text: Haters are a good problem to have. Nobody hates the good ones. They hate the great ones.
author: Kobe Bryant

text: Everything I do, I like to do as honestly as I can.
author: Larry Bird

text: Push yourself again and again. Don't give an inch until the final buzzer sounds.
author: Larry Bird

text: I've got a theory that if you give 100% all of the time, somehow things will work out in the end.
author: Larry Bird

text: A winner is someone who recognizes his God-given talents, works his tail off to develop them into skills.
author: Larry Bird

text: First master the fundamentals.
author: Larry Bird

text: Leadership is diving for a loose ball.
author: Larry Bird

text: I don't know if I practiced more than anybody, but I sure practiced enough.
author: Larry Bird

text: Once you are labeled 'the best' you want to stay up there, and you can't do it by loafing around.
author: Larry Bird

text: When it gets down to it, you just have to go out and do it.
author: Larry Bird

text: I wasn't real quick, and I wasn't real strong. Some guys just birth better, and birth stronger.
author: Larry Bird

text: As soon as I retire, I'm going to be in the gym every single day working out.
author: Shaquille O'Neal

text: Excellence is not a singular act, but a habit. You are what you repeatedly do.
author: Shaquille O'Neal

text: I'm not the one to judge myself. My job is to just go out there and compete.
author: Shaquille O'Neal

text: I'm a perfectionist. I'm pretty much insatiable. I feel like there's so many things I can improve on.
author: Serena Williams

text: In order to excel, you must be completely dedicated to your chosen sport.
author: Willie Mays

text: Skill is only developed by hours and hours of work.
author: Usain Bolt

text: Dreams are free. Goals have a cost.
author: Usain Bolt

text: Age is no barrier. It's a limitation you put on your mind.
author: Jackie Joyner-Kersee

text: If you aren't going all the way, why go at all?
author: Joe Namath

text: What you lack in talent can be made up with desire, hustle and giving 110% all the time.
author: Don Zimmer

text: The five S's of sports training are: stamina, speed, strength, skill, and spirit.
author: Morgan Wootten

text: Whoever said, 'It's not whether you win or lose that counts,' probably lost.
author: Martina Navratilova

text: Somewhere behind the athlete you've become is the child who fell in love with the game.
author: Mia Hamm

text: What makes something special is not just what you have to gain, but what you feel there is to lose.
author: Andre Agassi

text: The more difficult the victory, the greater the happiness in winning.
author: Pele

text: Success is not the key to happiness. Happiness is the key to success.
author: Albert Schweitzer

text: You miss 100% of the shots you don't take.
author: Wayne Gretzky

text: Gold medals aren't really made of gold. They're made of sweat, determination, and a rare alloy called guts.
author: Dan Gable

text: An athlete cannot run with money in his pockets. He must run with hope in his heart and dreams in his head.
author: Emil Zatopek

text: The pain you feel today will be the strength you feel tomorrow.
author: Unknown

text: The body achieves what the mind believes.
author: Unknown

text: Don't practice until you get it right. Practice until you can't get it wrong.
author: Unknown

text: Champions keep playing until they get it right.
author: Billie Jean King

text: It's not the will to win that matters — everyone has that. It's the will to prepare to win that matters.
author: Paul Bear Bryant

text: The only way to prove you're a good sport is to lose.
author: Ernie Banks

text: A trophy carries dust. Memories last forever.
author: Mary Lou Retton

text: Persistence can change failure into extraordinary achievement.
author: Matt Biondi

text: Do you know what my favorite part of the game is? The opportunity to play.
author: Mike Singletary

text: Set your goals high, and don't stop till you get there.
author: Bo Jackson

text: Most people give up just when they're about to achieve success.
author: Ross Perot

text: Never let your head hang down. Never give up and sit down and grieve. Find another way.
author: Satchel Paige

text: If you train hard, you'll not only be hard, you'll be hard to beat.
author: Herschel Walker

text: Breathe in deeply to bring your mind home to your body.
author: Thich Nhat Hanh

text: Perception is strong and sight weak. In strategy it is important to see distant things as if they were close.
author: Miyamoto Musashi

text: The way of the warrior is resolute acceptance of death.
author: Miyamoto Musashi

text: Think lightly of yourself and deeply of the world.
author: Miyamoto Musashi

text: You must understand that there is more than one path to the top of the mountain.
author: Miyamoto Musashi

text: Today is victory over yourself of yesterday.
author: Miyamoto Musashi

text: Absorb what is useful, discard what is useless and add what is specifically your own.
author: Bruce Lee

text: Mistakes are always forgivable, if one has the courage to admit them.
author: Bruce Lee

text: A wise man can learn more from a foolish question than a fool can learn from a wise answer.
author: Bruce Lee

text: Adapt what is useful, reject what is useless, and add what is specifically your own.
author: Bruce Lee

text: If you spend too much time thinking about a thing, you'll never get it done.
author: Bruce Lee

text: Knowing is not enough, we must apply. Willing is not enough, we must do.
author: Bruce Lee

text: The key to immortality is first living a life worth remembering.
author: Bruce Lee

text: To hell with circumstances; I create opportunities.
author: Bruce Lee

text: The successful warrior is the average man, with laser-like focus.
author: Bruce Lee

text: Real living is living for others.
author: Bruce Lee

text: If you always put limits on everything you do, physical or anything else, it will spread into your work and life.
author: Bruce Lee

text: No man is defeated until he is defeated from within.
author: Phil Jackson

text: Basketball is a beautiful game when the five players on the court play with one heartbeat.
author: Phil Jackson
